case_title: FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. vs. ANICETE, BENJAMIN

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-13-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NO DEFAULT JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY FOSTER J DONEHUE, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-28-1998 CONTINUED FROM MAY-13-1998 TO JUL-01-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANICETE, BENJAMIN $5,182.37 PRINCIPAL, $850.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $607.68 INTEREST, $113.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,753.05
